notes: Day 20 (Mar 19) UPDATE 8:15PM ET. Sources: CNN D20, AJ liveblog D20, CNBC (Brent $114.13), Bloomberg, Fortune, OilPrice.com, CBS, NPR, NBC, Wikipedia, Investing.com, IAEA, UKMTO, GlobalDefenseCorp, Euronews, PBS, ArabTimesOnline, Haaretz, DevDiscourse, MarketScreener, IsraelHayom, IranIntl, RFERL, Citi, KPC.

KUWAIT TWO REFINERIES ABLAZE — MAJOR ESCALATION: Mina al-Ahmadi refinery (730K bbl/day, one of Middle East's largest) hit by drone — fire contained by KPC, no injuries. THEN Mina Abdullah refinery ALSO hit by drone — second refinery ablaze. First direct hits on Kuwait's oil refining infrastructure. Combined capacity ~1.4M bbl/day at risk. IRGC energy doctrine now producing real industrial damage beyond harassment.

QATARENERGY CONFIRMS 'SEVERAL' LNG FACILITIES HIT: QatarEnergy said several LNG facilities targeted in missile attacks causing 'sizeable fires' and 'extensive damage.' Goes beyond earlier Ras Laffan reports — multiple facilities across Qatar's LNG complex under attack. Qatar's entire LNG export capacity (~77M tonnes/year, ~25% of global LNG trade) threatened.

BRENT SURGES TO $114+: CNBC reports Brent up 6.3% to $114.13/barrel — highest since D8 spike. WTI $96.88. Citi forecast: Brent $120+ coming days, could average $130 Q2-Q3 if Strait stays closed. Kuwait refinery fires + Qatar LNG damage = supply crunch deepening. Energy war now producing cascading infrastructure damage.

BANDAR ANZALI HEAVY BOMBARDMENT: Overnight strikes expanded Caspian campaign — two drone attacks followed by heavy bombardment targeting IRGC + army naval units. Fuel storage sites damaged, several warships destroyed. Iran-Russia Caspian supply lifeline targeted (IsraelHayom). Shahin Shahr police station (near Isfahan) also hit. Tehran: fighter jet activity + explosions early Thursday.

GABBARD SENATE TESTIMONY — CONTRADICTS TRUMP: DNI told Senate Intelligence Committee Iran regime 'intact but largely degraded.' Written testimony stated Iran was NOT rebuilding enrichment after Operation Midnight Hammer — directly contradicting Trump's justification for war. Gabbard omitted this from oral testimony; Sen. Warner: 'You chose to omit the parts that contradict Trump.' Declined to call threat 'imminent.' Admitted IC 'long assessed' Iran would close Hormuz.

IRGC ENERGY DOCTRINE — NOW HITTING REAL TARGETS: IRGC named targets being struck AND follow-through accelerating. Kuwait 2 refineries. Qatar several LNG facilities. Saudi Al-Kharj 2 killed + Riyadh. UAE Habshan shutdown continues. This is NO LONGER just harassment — real industrial capacity being damaged. Saudi FM Prince Faisal warned of retaliation.

NUCLEAR: IAEA — 440kg at 60% = ~10 WEAPONS: Grossi confirms Isfahan underground status unknown. IAEA observing 'regular vehicular activity' at Isfahan tunnel entrance. E3: 'increasing risk of diversion.' Cannot discount facility 'already operational.' Iran's 4th known enrichment plant.

TRUMP THREATENS SOUTH PARS: 'US will massively blow up the entirety of the South Pars Gas Field' if Iran attacks Qatar again. Claims US 'knew nothing' about Israel's South Pars strike. Israel struck Asaluyeh energy complex.
PEZESHKIAN RESIGNATION CRISIS: President requested meeting with Mojtaba to resign. IRGC blocking all decisions. No official confirmation yet. Analysts: Iran = military dictatorship.
IRAN EXECUTES SWEDISH CITIZEN on espionage charges. Major diplomatic incident amid war.
12 ARAB/ISLAMIC FM JOINT STATEMENT: Demanded Iran 'immediately halt attacks.' Fed holds rates.
KUWAIT: 4 ballistic + 23 drones confirmed + 2 refinery drone hits + 26 total Hezbollah operatives detained.
HORMUZ TRANSIT DATA: 89 ships crossed March 1-15 including 16 oil tankers (Lloyd's List). Permission-based transit expanding but IRGC energy escalation contradicts.
LEBANON ~990+ KILLED: Approaching 1,000 total. ~1M displaced (19% population). Ground ops continue. Litani bridges targeted.
PENTAGON $200B+ SUPPLEMENTAL. Iran internet blackout now 250+ hours.
KENT FBI INVESTIGATION + GABBARD ALIGNMENT: War's domestic political legitimacy eroding from both directions.
SAUDI RAS TANURA RESTARTING: 550K bbl/day. BUT Saudi FM warns of retaliation against Iran — 'trust completely shattered.'

theoryBox: Day 20 evening — ENERGY WAR PRODUCING REAL DAMAGE: IRGC energy doctrine no longer aspirational — Kuwait TWO refineries ablaze (Mina al-Ahmadi 730K bbl/day + Mina Abdullah), QatarEnergy confirms 'several' LNG facilities hit with 'sizeable fires.' Brent surges to $114+ (CNBC +6.3%). Citi: $120+ coming days. Bandar Anzali heavy bombardment — warships destroyed, fuel storage damaged. Gabbard contradicted Trump — Iran NOT rebuilding enrichment. IAEA: 440kg = ~10 weapons, Isfahan unknown. Saudi FM warns retaliation — 'trust completely shattered.' Lebanon ~990+. Pentagon $200B+. Internet 250+ hrs. Four spirals accelerating: energy infrastructure damage + nuclear + IRGC dictatorship + US war rationale collapsing.
theoryBox_fa: روز ۲۰ شب — جنگ انرژی آسیب واقعی: کویت ۲ پالایشگاه آتش (مینا الاحمدی + مینا عبدالله). قطرانرژی: چند تأسیسات LNG. نفت ۱۱۴+. سیتی: ۱۲۰+. بندرانزلی: ناوها نابود. گابارد: تناقض. IAEA: ۱۰ سلاح. عربستان هشدار انتقام. لبنان ~۹۹۰+. چهار مارپیچ تسریع.

metrics.label: Day
metrics.desc: ENERGY WAR PRODUCING REAL DAMAGE. Kuwait 2 refineries ablaze. Qatar several LNG facilities hit. Brent $114+. Gabbard contradicts Trump. IAEA: 10 weapons. Saudi FM warns retaliation. Internet 250+ hrs.

metrics.label: Cumul. missiles
metrics.desc: D20 REVISED: 40. QatarEnergy confirms 'several' LNG facilities hit by missiles — additional strikes beyond earlier Ras Laffan count. Kuwait 4 ballistic. Saudi + Israel cluster. 22+ vessel incidents. IRGC energy doctrine producing industrial damage.

metrics.label: Cumul. drones
metrics.desc: D20 REVISED: 75. Kuwait 23 intercepted + Mina al-Ahmadi refinery hit + Mina Abdullah refinery hit. Saudi drones (Riyadh + Al-Kharj). IRGC now hitting real infrastructure — 2 refineries ablaze.

metrics.label: Brent crude
metrics.desc: SURGING — CNBC: $114.13 (+6.3%). Kuwait refinery fires + Qatar LNG damage = supply crunch. Citi: $120+ coming days, $130 avg Q2-Q3 if Strait stays closed. WTI $96.88. Jones Act waived 60 days.

metrics.label: Iran dead (Hengaw)
metrics.desc: Hengaw 5th report (D18): 4,789 military + 511 civilians. HRANA: 3,114. Health Ministry: 1,444 + 18,551 injured. No 6th report yet. 178 cities, 25 provinces. Internet blackout 240+ hrs.

metrics.label: Lebanon
metrics.desc: Approaching 1,000. Israel ground ops + Litani bridges. 2 divisions deployed. ~1M displaced (19% pop). Qassem: 'long confrontation.'

metrics.label: Israel dead
metrics.desc: D20: 2 killed Ramat Gan (cluster), 3 women killed West Bank hair salon (cluster fragments), foreign worker Moshav Adanim. 3,727+ wounded.

metrics.label: Nuclear risk
metrics.desc: IAEA: 440kg at 60% = ~10 weapons (revised up). Isfahan underground status unknown — Grossi: 'haven't visited.' Regular vehicular activity at tunnel. E3: 'increasing risk of diversion.' Gabbard: Iran NOT rebuilding pre-war. 4th enrichment plant.

metrics_fa.label: روز
metrics_fa.desc: جنگ انرژی آسیب واقعی. کویت ۲ پالایشگاه آتش. قطر چند LNG. نفت ۱۱۴+. گابارد تناقض. IAEA: ۱۰ سلاح. عربستان هشدار.

metrics_fa.label: موشک
metrics_fa.desc: D20 بازنگری: ۴۰. قطرانرژی: چند تأسیسات LNG موشک. کویت ۴ بالستیک. سپاه آسیب صنعتی.

metrics_fa.label: پهپاد
metrics_fa.desc: D20 بازنگری: ۷۵. مینا الاحمدی + مینا عبدالله آتش. کویت ۲۳. سپاه زیرساخت واقعی.

metrics_fa.label: نفت
metrics_fa.desc: جهش — CNBC: ۱۱۴. پالایشگاه + LNG = بحران عرضه. سیتی: ۱۲۰+. جونز اکت لغو.

metrics_fa.label: کشته ایران
metrics_fa.desc: هنگاو ۵: ۴,۷۸۹ نظامی + ۵۱۱ غیرنظامی. اینترنت ۲۴۰+ ساعت قطع.

metrics_fa.label: لبنان
metrics_fa.desc: نزدیک ۱,۰۰۰. عملیات زمینی. پل لیطانی. ۱ میلیون آواره.

metrics_fa.label: خطر هسته‌ای
metrics_fa.desc: IAEA: ۴۴۰ کیلو = ~۱۰ سلاح. اصفهان: فعالیت خودرویی. E3: خطر انحراف. گابارد: بازسازی نشده.

sitrep: KUWAIT TWO REFINERIES ABLAZE — ENERGY WAR CROSSES THRESHOLD: Mina al-Ahmadi refinery (730K bbl/day, one of Middle East's largest) hit by drone — fire contained. THEN Mina Abdullah refinery ALSO ablaze. First direct hits on Kuwait's oil refining infrastructure. Combined capacity ~1.4M bbl/day at risk. IRGC energy doctrine no longer aspirational — real industrial capacity being destroyed. This changes the calculus for Gulf states considering military entry.

QATARENERGY: 'SEVERAL' LNG FACILITIES HIT: QatarEnergy confirmed multiple LNG facilities targeted in missile attacks causing 'sizeable fires' and 'extensive damage.' Beyond earlier Ras Laffan reports — Qatar's entire LNG export capacity (~25% of global LNG trade) under systematic attack. Qatar expelled Iranian attaches. Trump threatened total South Pars destruction if attacks continue.

BRENT SURGES $114+ — SUPPLY CRUNCH DEEPENING: CNBC reports Brent +6.3% to $114.13/barrel. Highest since D8 spike. Citi forecast: $120+ coming days, $130 avg Q2-Q3 if Strait stays closed. Kuwait refinery fires + Qatar LNG damage + Habshan shutdown + IRGC named targets = cascading supply destruction. Ras Tanura restart (550K bbl/day) overwhelmed by new damage. Jones Act waived 60 days. Pentagon $200B+ supplemental.

BANDAR ANZALI HEAVY BOMBARDMENT — CASPIAN EXPANSION: Overnight two drone attacks followed by heavy bombardment targeting IRGC + army naval units. Fuel storage sites damaged, warships destroyed. Iran-Russia Caspian supply lifeline targeted. Shahin Shahr police station (near Isfahan) also hit. Tehran: fighter jet activity + explosions early Thursday. Geographic expansion of strikes continues north.

GABBARD CONTRADICTS TRUMP — WAR RATIONALE CRACKING: DNI told Senate Iran was NOT rebuilding enrichment — contradicting Trump's justification. Declined to call threat 'imminent.' Admitted IC predicted Hormuz closure. Warner: 'You chose to omit the parts that contradict Trump.' Combined with Kent FBI probe = war legitimacy crisis deepening.

IAEA NUCLEAR UPDATE — 10 WEAPONS-WORTH: 440kg at 60% = ~10 weapons. Isfahan underground status unknown — 'regular vehicular activity' at tunnel entrance. E3: 'increasing risk of diversion.' Grossi: war cannot eliminate nuclear program. Nuclear risk intensifying while pre-war justification collapses.

SAUDI FM WARNS RETALIATION: Prince Faisal bin Farhan — 'trust completely shattered.' Called on Iran to end strikes, warning of military response. Saudi Al-Kharj 2 killed. Riyadh drones. Saudi increasingly close to military entry threshold.
IRAN 'REVENGE' STRIKES ON ISRAEL: Multiple-warhead + cluster munitions — 2 killed Ramat Gan, 3 women killed WB hair salon, foreign worker Moshav Adanim. Israel 22+ dead, 3,727+ wounded.
KUWAIT: 4 ballistic + 23 intercepted + Mina al-Ahmadi + Mina Abdullah refinery drones + 26 Hezbollah operatives detained. Most impacted Gulf state by industrial damage.
PEZESHKIAN RESIGNATION + IRGC DICTATORSHIP: President sought to resign. IRGC blocking decisions. No civilian negotiating partner.
LEBANON ~990+ KILLED: Approaching 1,000. ~1M displaced (19% pop). Ground ops + Litani bridges. 2 divisions deployed.
IRAN: Internet blackout 250+ hours. Swedish execution. Fed holds. 12 FM statement. Overnight: Tehran explosions, Bandar Anzali, Shahin Shahr. CENTCOM: 7,800+ targets.
sitrep_fa: کویت ۲ پالایشگاه آتش: مینا الاحمدی (۷۳۰ هزار بشکه) + مینا عبدالله. سپاه دکترین انرژی واقعی شد. ~۱.۴ میلیون بشکه در خطر.
قطرانرژی: چند تأسیسات LNG حمله — آتش گسترده. ۲۵٪ تجارت LNG جهان تهدید. ترامپ: پارس جنوبی.
نفت ۱۱۴+ — CNBC +۶.۳٪. سیتی: ۱۲۰+ روزهای آینده. بحران عرضه تشدید. پنتاگون ۲۰۰+ میلیارد.
بندرانزلی: بمباران سنگین — ناوها نابود، مخازن سوخت. خزر = خط ایران-روسیه. شاهین‌شهر. تهران: انفجار.
گابارد: ایران بازسازی نمی‌کرد. تناقض با ترامپ. کنت FBI. مشروعیت فروریخت.
IAEA: ۴۴۰ کیلو = ۱۰ سلاح. اصفهان ناشناخته. E3 هشدار. گروسی: جنگ حذف نمی‌کند.
عربستان هشدار انتقام: 'اعتماد کاملاً شکسته.' الخرج ۲ کشته. نزدیک آستانه نظامی.

dailySeries.sourceLabel: D1-D10: JPost. D11: UAE MoD. D12-D20: fragment est. D20 EVE REVISED: QatarEnergy 'several' LNG facilities hit (missiles up). Kuwait Mina al-Ahmadi + Mina Abdullah refineries ablaze (drones up). IRGC energy doctrine now producing real industrial damage.

oil.note: Full daily series. D20 EVE: Brent SURGES $114.13 (CNBC +6.3%) — Kuwait 2 refineries ablaze + Qatar several LNG facilities = supply crunch. Open $103.71, spiked $112 midday, now $114+ evening. WTI $96.88. Citi: $120+ coming days, $130 avg Q2-Q3. Jones Act waived 60 days. Ras Tanura restarting but overwhelmed by new damage. Dubai crude >$150. Hormuz: 89 ships March 1-15. Permission-based transit expanding but contradicted by IRGC escalation.

latestTargetBreakdown.note: Mar 19 (D20) evening estimate. REVISED UP AGAIN. QatarEnergy confirms 'several' LNG facilities hit by missiles. Kuwait Mina al-Ahmadi (730K bbl/day) + Mina Abdullah refineries both ablaze from drones. Kuwait 4 ballistic + 25+ drones. Saudi Al-Kharj 2 killed. 2 vessels (UKMTO). Israel cluster.

dailyRows.primary: All-theater: UAE (Al Dhafra, Dubai airport, Palm Jumeirah), Israel (Tel Aviv, Haifa), Saudi (Ras Tanura), Qatar (Al Udeid), Kuwait, Bahrain, Jordan
dailyRows.capability: Operation Roaring Lion / True Promise IV launched within hours. 480 ballistic missiles + 720 drones on D1. Fastest Iranian response ever — suggests pre-positioned C2.
dailyRows.cost: Khamenei killed. IRIS Dena sunk by US submarine off Sri Lanka. Brent $72 (+$7). Hormuz shipping halted immediately — 150 ships stalled.
dailyRows.assessment: Overwhelming opening salvo. Iran distributing fire across 13 countries to overwhelm defenses.

dailyRows.primary: Peak launch day. UAE heaviest target. Israel: 124 injured from 10-warhead ballistic missile at Tel Aviv.
dailyRows.capability: 520 missiles + 850 drones — highest single-day volume. Iran expending stockpile rapidly.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $79.45 (CNBC). Iran state media confirms Khamenei family killed. Assembly of Experts emergency session. Jebel Ali Port fire, AWS data center hit.
dailyRows.assessment: Peak fury. Iran burning through inventory at unsustainable rate.

dailyRows.primary: Kuwait (6 US KIA at Shuaiba Port operations center), Bahrain, Saudi (US Embassy Riyadh drones), Israel (Hezbollah joins)
dailyRows.capability: 400+530. Kuwaiti F/A-18 friendly-fire shoots down 3 US F-15Es (all 6 crew survive). Hezbollah opens second front.
dailyRows.cost: 6 US KIA — first American combat deaths. Brent ~$83. Qatar arrests 10 IRGC cell operatives.
dailyRows.assessment: War expands. US casualties mount. Hezbollah + Iraqi militias = multi-front.

dailyRows.primary: Nuclear sites: Natanz entrance destroyed, Isfahan, Fordow access roads hit, Arak targeted
dailyRows.capability: 350+480. Declining from peak but still massive. Coalition strikes nuclear infrastructure.
dailyRows.cost: IAEA confirms Natanz inaccessible. Enrichment stockpile unverified 8+ months. Humanitarian crisis emerging.
dailyRows.assessment: Nuclear dimension activated. Escalation risk from enrichment uncertainty.

dailyRows.primary: Hezbollah long-range missile at Tel Aviv. Israel 250+ strikes on Lebanon. IRIS Dena confirmed sunk.
dailyRows.capability: 250+350. Clear decline. Senate rejects war powers resolution. CSIS: first 100 hours = $3.7B.
dailyRows.cost: Lebanon front fully active. Brent ~$90. Senate gives Trump political cover.
dailyRows.assessment: Decline accelerating. Political constraints loosening domestically.

dailyRows.primary: Qatar (14 ballistic + 4 drones per MoD), Kuwait, Bahrain, UAE
dailyRows.capability: 150+220. Fars claims >500 missiles, ~2,000 drones cumul. Rate ↓69% missiles, ↓74% drones.
dailyRows.cost: Brent ~$92. IEA triggers largest coordinated SPR release in history (400M bbl). War cost ~$2B/day.
dailyRows.assessment: Iran's ballistic capability declining structurally. Economic war intensifying.

dailyRows.primary: Continued Gulf + Israel harassment. Iraq: PMF HQs struck across multiple provinces.
dailyRows.capability: 100+160. Rate ↓79% missiles. >60% of Iranian launchers neutralized. 43 naval vessels destroyed.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $92.69 (CNBC). VLCC freight rates approaching records. Ruwais refinery shut (922K bbl/day offline).
dailyRows.assessment: Iran losing conventional capability. Asymmetric phase beginning.

dailyRows.primary: Diminished volume across Gulf. Iraq militia attacks intensify. F-35 shoots down Iranian Yak-130 — first F-35 air-to-air kill.
dailyRows.capability: 70+110. Rate ↓85%. Red Crescent: 65 schools, 32 medical facilities damaged.
dailyRows.cost: Brent intraday volatility. IEA Oil Market Report: 'largest supply disruption in history.' 20 Mb/d offline. Iran internet blackout persists.
dailyRows.assessment: Conventional campaign near-spent. Iran shifting to economic leverage.

dailyRows.primary: UAE MoD cumul: 1,422 UAVs detected (1,342 intercepted). All 8 cruise missiles intercepted.
dailyRows.capability: 50+80. Rate ↓90%. UAE air defenses showing strain but holding.
dailyRows.cost: Brent hits $119.50 — 52-week high (Investing.com). IEA: 'within whisker of $120.' Then crashes on SPR release news. Extreme volatility.
dailyRows.assessment: Oil price spike signals market panic. SPR intervention buys temporary relief.

dailyRows.primary: Mojtaba Khamenei designated new Supreme Leader by Assembly of Experts. NATO intercepts 2nd missile over Turkey.
dailyRows.capability: 40+60. Rate ↓92%. Trump claims war 'very complete, pretty much.' Then backtracks.
dailyRows.cost: Brent crashes to $88.43 (CNBC) — post-SPR selloff. EIA settles $94. Turkey deploys F-16s to N. Cyprus. 10,000+ civilian sites damaged in Iran.
dailyRows.assessment: Political transition in Iran. Conventional capability near-exhausted but regime intact.

dailyRows.primary: UAE reports continued intercepts. Gulf state coordination improving. Iraq: 300+ militia attacks cumul since D1.
dailyRows.capability: 27+81 (scaled from UAE MoD). Missile launches at lowest sustained level. Drones maintaining higher volume — cheaper, harder to suppress.
dailyRows.cost: Brent ~$91. Trump signals drawdown but Pentagon contradicts. Mixed messages on endgame.
dailyRows.assessment: Drone-missile divergence: missiles near-depleted but drone harassment continues at meaningful level.

dailyRows.primary: UAE MoD: 13 missiles (6 ballistic + 7 cruise) + 39 drones intercepted (official). Bahrain airport drones + fuel tanks fire. Ship hit in Hormuz.
dailyRows.capability: UAE cumul: 268 ballistic + 15 cruise + 1,514 UAVs. Fortune: Brent $90.96 AM. Drone attacks on airports emerging as pattern.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $91.98 close (CNBC). UKMTO: 16+ ships attacked cumul. Container ship fire in Hormuz.
dailyRows.assessment: Low-volume but high-disruption attacks on civilian infrastructure.

dailyRows.primary: Bahrain airport hit. Kuwait airport targeted. Dubai explosions. Abu Dhabi old airport fire. Container ship attacked near Jebel Ali.
dailyRows.capability: 8+40. KC-135 Stratotanker crashes western Iraq — 6 US KIA (total now 13). 4th US aircraft lost. Iran militias claim credit.
dailyRows.cost: Brent first >$100 close: $100.46 (CNBC). Fortune AM: $99.84. French CWO Frion killed near Erbil — first non-US allied death.
dailyRows.assessment: US losses mounting. Oil breaking $100 sustainably. French casualty internationalizes war.

dailyRows.primary: New Supreme Leader Khamenei first statement (written only — no video). Vows Hormuz stays closed. 3 more ships struck. Kuwait power lines hit by debris.
dailyRows.capability: 10+30. CENTCOM: 6,000+ US targets struck. 90+ Iranian vessels destroyed. Ballistic ↓86% from D1. UNSC Res 2817 condemns Iran 13-0-2.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $99.32 (CNBC). Khamenei statement fuels speculation on injuries. $10M bounty on Khamenei. State Dept: 'likely disfigured.'
dailyRows.assessment: Khamenei's absence and written-only statement suggests serious injuries. IRGC operating autonomously.

dailyRows.primary: UAE 9 ballistic + 33 drones intercepted (AJ). Qatar 4 ballistic + drones. Saudi 51 drones — LARGEST single-day barrage targeting kingdom. Kuwait airport drones. Jordan: 79/85 intercepted over week 2.
dailyRows.capability: 20+70. DRONE VOLUME TICKED UP — Saudi's 51-drone barrage a significant escalation. Kharg Island: 90+ military targets struck by CENTCOM (sparing oil). White House: ballistic ↓90%, drones ↓95%, 65+ vessels sunk.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $103.14 Fri close (CNBC). Fujairah oil hub fire from drone debris. IRGC declares UAE bases 'legitimate targets.' Trump 'not ready for deal.' May hit Kharg 'a few more times just for fun.'
dailyRows.assessment: Drone escalation despite missile depletion. Saudi barrage = Iran still has UAV stockpile. Kharg strike shows coalition restraint on oil — but for how long?

dailyRows.primary: Heaviest single-night bombardment since D1: Isfahan, Shiraz (20+ explosions), Tehran, Dezful, Khomein, Hamedan, Jask port. 6+ provinces. 10+ hypersonic missiles at Israel.
dailyRows.capability: 25+60. IRGC fires 10+ HYPERSONIC missiles at Israel — capability escalation. Israel critically low on ballistic interceptors (Semafor). IDF: 7,600+ strikes in Iran, 1,100+ in Lebanon cumul.
dailyRows.cost: 15+ killed Isfahan. Shiraz residential areas hit. 10,000+ homes destroyed (Tehran governor). 56 cultural sites damaged. Pope calls ceasefire. Pahlavi outlines transition. Houthis threaten Red Sea resumption.
dailyRows.assessment: Hypersonic escalation + interceptor crisis = war's most dangerous moment since D1. Houthi threat = potential second maritime chokepoint.

dailyRows.primary: Israel new Tehran strikes (smoke over capital). Dubai airport drone fire (flights suspended→limited). Abu Dhabi missile kill. Fujairah drone fire. Saudi 37 drones intercepted (AJ). Baghdad airport rockets. Israel: 245 attack waves total.
dailyRows.capability: DRONE VOLUME SURGED — Saudi 37 drones alone is highest single-day count from kingdom. IRGC claims most weapons cache intact and hasn't used post-2025 missiles yet. If true, Iran's offensive depth is much greater than ↓90% suggests. Israel planning 3+ more weeks of strikes.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $106+. Gulf exports ↓61% (Reuters/Kpler). US wounded revised to ~200. Hormuz coalition failing — Australia, Japan, Germany all declined. G5 'gravely concerned' re Lebanon. Trump threatens NATO umbrella + Xi summit.
dailyRows.assessment: IRGC 'arsenal intact' claim is the most significant D17 development. If true, Iran has been deliberately rationing — using old stock while preserving modern missiles. This reframes the entire attrition narrative. War may have much longer tail than assumed.

dailyRows.primary: DECAPITATION: Larijani + Soleimani confirmed killed. UAE full airspace closure. Qatar 13/14 ballistic intercepted. Saudi 12+ drones. Baghdad Al-Rasheed Hotel + embassy targeted. Abu Dhabi 1 killed. Tanker struck off Fujairah. Israel ground invasion of Lebanon.
dailyRows.capability: Decapitation accelerating but Qatar 13/14 ballistic missiles = Iran still has meaningful ballistic capability. IRGC 'cache intact' claim from D16 gaining credibility. Israel ground ops in Lebanon = second full front.
dailyRows.cost: Joe Kent (NCTC director) resigned — 'Iran not a threat.' Trump: don't need NATO. Delayed China trip 1 month. France: 'never' Hormuz during war. Amnesty: 170+ schoolgirls killed in US strike.
dailyRows.assessment: Crosscurrents: Military decapitation vs economic leverage. Israel destroying command structure but Iran's remaining capability + Hormuz control = strategic stalemate. First tanker transit could signal beginning of negotiated passage framework.

dailyRows.primary: ENERGY + NUCLEAR WAR: Israel struck South Pars (AM). Iran hit Ras Laffan LNG TWICE (PM). Bushehr NPP 'hostile projectile' (IAEA: no reactor damage, Rosatom suspended construction). 5th senior kill (Basij head + Khatib). Kuwait 4 ballistic + 20 drones. Multi-warhead at Israel (2 killed). Saudi 4 ballistic at Riyadh DURING FM meeting + drone at gas facility.
dailyRows.capability: ENERGY WAR FULLY MUTUAL + NUCLEAR DIMENSION. Ras Laffan x2, South Pars, Bushehr NPP all hit in single day. Iran named specific Gulf targets (Samref, Jubail, Mesaieed, Al Hosn). Multi-warhead Khorramshahr-4 + Qadr. Israel striking northern Iran. D19 missile count REVISED UP from 35→40 on 2nd Ras Laffan confirmation.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $107.38 close (CNBC), spiked $111+ after-hours. Gas $3.84 (+29%). Fed held rates. Pentagon $200B+. Qatar expelled attaches. Saudi: 'right to military action.' 12 FM joint statement. E3 backing military defense. Hengaw: 5,300 dead. Lebanon 880+. Kataib Hezbollah conditional pause. IMO emergency meeting.
dailyRows.assessment: INFLECTION: Energy + nuclear. Bushehr projectile = nuclear-adjacent escalation. Ras Laffan x2 = Qatar's LNG industry threatened. E3 military backing + 12 FM statement + Saudi warning = diplomatic momentum toward intervention OR escalation. Kataib Hezbollah pause offer = first crack in Iran proxy unity. IMO corridor = international shipping institutions mobilizing. Every constraint dissolving simultaneously.

dailyRows.primary: ENERGY WAR CROSSES THRESHOLD: Kuwait TWO refineries ablaze (Mina al-Ahmadi 730K bbl/day + Mina Abdullah). QatarEnergy: 'several' LNG facilities hit — 'sizeable fires.' IRGC named targets + Caspian. Israel cluster kills 5. Kuwait 4 ballistic + 25+ drones. Saudi Al-Kharj 2 killed. Gabbard contradicts Trump. IAEA: 440kg = ~10 weapons. Bandar Anzali heavy bombardment — warships destroyed. Shahin Shahr. Tehran overnight explosions.
dailyRows.capability: D20 EVE REVISED: 40 missiles + 75 drones. IRGC energy doctrine now producing REAL INDUSTRIAL DAMAGE — not just harassment. Kuwait 2 refineries (~1.4M bbl/day combined at risk), Qatar several LNG facilities (~25% global trade), UAE Habshan still shut. 22+ vessel incidents. CENTCOM: 7,800+ targets. Bandar Anzali: warships destroyed, fuel storage damaged. Iran-Russia Caspian supply lifeline targeted.
dailyRows.cost: Brent SURGES $114+ (CNBC +6.3%). Citi: $120+ coming days. Kuwait refineries + Qatar LNG = cascading supply crunch. Asian markets plunging. Saudi FM: 'trust completely shattered,' warns retaliation. Gabbard = war rationale cracking. Pezeshkian resignation (unconfirmed). Kent FBI probe. 12 FM statement. Swedish execution. Fed holds. Lebanon ~990+. Israel 22+. Internet 250+ hrs. Pentagon $200B+.
dailyRows.assessment: FOUR CRISES ACCELERATING: (1) Energy — IRGC doctrine CROSSED FROM HARASSMENT TO INDUSTRIAL DAMAGE. Kuwait 2 refineries, Qatar several LNG facilities, UAE Habshan = real capacity destruction. Brent $114+ heading toward $120. Citi forecasts $130 if sustained. Ras Tanura restart overwhelmed. (2) Nuclear — IAEA: 440kg = ~10 weapons, Isfahan underground unknown, E3 diversion warning. (3) Political — Pezeshkian + IRGC dictatorship. (4) War legitimacy — Gabbard contradicts Trump, Kent FBI. Saudi FM retaliation warning = Gulf states approaching military entry threshold. The evening's Kuwait + Qatar damage is qualitatively different from earlier harassment — industrial infrastructure being destroyed.

timeline.title: Week 3 (Mar 16–22)
timeline.body: ENERGY WAR — HARASSMENT TO INDUSTRIAL DAMAGE: IRGC named targets then HIT THEM. Kuwait TWO refineries ablaze (Mina al-Ahmadi 730K bbl/day + Mina Abdullah). QatarEnergy: 'several' LNG facilities — 'sizeable fires.' Brent $114+. Citi: $120+. Bandar Anzali heavy bombardment. Saudi FM 'trust shattered' warns retaliation. Gabbard contradicts Trump — Iran NOT rebuilding. IAEA: 10 weapons. Pezeshkian = IRGC dictatorship. Four crises accelerating: energy industrial damage + nuclear + political + US war legitimacy.

timeline.title: Week 4–5 (Mar 23–Apr 5)
timeline.body: IRGC follow-through on named targets = critical variable. If Samref, Jubail, Mesaieed, Al Hosn actually struck: oil $130+, Saudi military entry triggered, all Gulf logistics collapse. If threats remain aspirational: energy war as coercive pressure framework. Isfahan nuclear unresolved. US missile resupply crisis (Zelensky: 800+ Patriots Day 1, 60-65/mo produced). Lebanon Litani operation culminating. Pezeshkian resignation could formalize IRGC takeover.

timeline.title: Month 2 (Apr–May)
timeline.body: Three crises converge: (1) Energy — IRGC targeting doctrine vs Gulf defenses + bypass routes; (2) Nuclear — Isfahan underground + IAEA locked out = breakout window; (3) Political — IRGC dictatorship + Pezeshkian crisis = no negotiating partner. US missile supply becomes binding constraint. Hormuz permission-based framework either formalizes or collapses. Oil market in structural disruption.

timeline.title: Month 3+ (May onward)
timeline.body: If IRGC follows through on energy targets: permanent regional restructuring. Saudi entry = wider war. If political disintegration accelerates: IRGC-only government with no diplomatic facade. Nuclear verification crisis defines decade. US must choose between sustained ops (resource depletion) and exit (nuclear + energy unresolved). No clean outcome available.

timeline.title: Endgame variables
timeline.body: IRGC follow-through on named energy targets. Saudi military entry decision. US missile resupply timeline (Zelensky data). Isfahan nuclear breakout window. Pezeshkian resignation / IRGC formalization. Hormuz permission framework. Trump South Pars threat. Lebanon Litani outcome. Caspian Sea escalation. Swedish execution diplomatic fallout.

timeline_fa.title: هفته ۳ (۱۶–۲۲ مارس)
timeline_fa.body: جنگ انرژی — از آزار به تخریب: کویت ۲ پالایشگاه آتش. قطر چند LNG. نفت ۱۱۴+. بندرانزلی. عربستان هشدار. گابارد تناقض. IAEA: ۱۰ سلاح. چهار بحران تسریع.

timeline_fa.title: هفته ۴–۵
timeline_fa.body: سپاه اهداف نام‌برده = متغیر حیاتی. اگر سامرف/جبیل: نفت ۱۳۰+، ورود عربستان. اصفهان حل‌نشده. موشک آمریکا بحران. لبنان لیطانی. پزشکیان = رسمی شدن سپاه.

timeline_fa.title: ماه ۲
timeline_fa.body: سه بحران: انرژی + هسته‌ای + سیاسی. موشک آمریکا محدودکننده. هرمز رسمی یا فروپاشی.

timeline_fa.title: ماه ۳+
timeline_fa.body: سپاه اهداف انرژی = بازسازی دائمی. ورود عربستان = جنگ گسترده‌تر. سپاه بدون نما = بدون مذاکره. هسته‌ای دهه. آمریکا: ادامه یا خروج.

timeline_fa.title: متغیرهای پایانی
timeline_fa.body: سپاه اهداف انرژی. عربستان. موشک آمریکا (زلنسکی). اصفهان. پزشکیان. هرمز. ترامپ پارس جنوبی. لبنان. خزر. سوئد.

scenarioProbabilities.name: Escalation spiral / total war
scenarioProbabilities.body: INCREASED from 40%. Kuwait TWO refineries ablaze + Qatar several LNG facilities = IRGC energy doctrine PRODUCING REAL INDUSTRIAL DAMAGE. This is the threshold crossing — from harassment to capacity destruction. Saudi FM 'trust completely shattered' + retaliation warning = Gulf states approaching military entry. Brent $114+ heading to $120. Citi: $130 if sustained. If Saudi enters militarily: total regional war. IRGC follow-through accelerating — no longer aspirational. Gabbard testimony = political brake on US side but IRGC escalation overriding.

scenarioProbabilities.name: Protracted attrition
scenarioProbabilities.body: DECREASED from 23%. Evening's industrial damage makes low-tempo harassment scenario LESS LIKELY. Kuwait refineries + Qatar LNG = IRGC escalating, not settling into harassment pattern. For attrition to hold: IRGC must stop hitting real industrial targets and revert to interceptable drones. Evening suggests opposite trajectory. However, if Gulf defenses improve and IRGC runs low on precision-strike capability, could still revert.

scenarioProbabilities.name: Declared victory + exit
scenarioProbabilities.body: DECREASED from 18%. Kuwait refineries ablaze + Brent $114 = war visibly worsening, not winding down. Johnson's 'objectives met' increasingly absurd against $114 oil and burning refineries. Gabbard testimony + collapsing justification + escalating economic damage = exit narrative has no credibility. CENTCOM stats meaningless when Gulf allies' infrastructure burns.

scenarioProbabilities.name: International intervention / ceasefire
scenarioProbabilities.body: SLIGHTLY INCREASED from 11%. Kuwait refinery damage + Qatar LNG + Brent $114 = global economic urgency intensifying. IMO + E3 + 12 FM momentum. Citi $130 forecast = recession trigger. International pressure to end war increasing as economic costs cascade globally. BUT: no Iranian negotiating partner (IRGC dictatorship). Most likely form: UN-brokered Hormuz corridor + partial oil flow.

scenarioProbabilities.name: Regime fracture / IRGC formalization
scenarioProbabilities.body: UNCHANGED. Already happening. Pezeshkian crisis + IRGC controlling everything = military dictatorship in all but name.

scenarioProbabilities.name: Negotiated deal
scenarioProbabilities.body: DECREASED from 3%. IRGC industrial damage campaign = they are escalating, not negotiating. No civilian partner. Isfahan underground unresolved. Hormuz permission-based transit = only backdoor channel but contradicted by refinery attacks.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.name: مارپیچ تشدید / جنگ تمام‌عیار
scenarioProbabilities_fa.body: افزایش از ۴۰٪. کویت ۲ پالایشگاه + قطر LNG = سپاه از آزار به تخریب صنعتی. عربستان: 'اعتماد شکسته.' نفت ۱۱۴+. ورود عربستان = کلید.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.name: فرسایشی
scenarioProbabilities_fa.body: کاهش از ۲۳٪. تخریب صنعتی = سناریوی آزار کم‌شدت بعیدتر. سپاه تشدید.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.name: اعلام پیروزی + خروج
scenarioProbabilities_fa.body: کاهش. پالایشگاه آتش + نفت ۱۱۴ = جنگ بدتر نه بهتر. جانسون بی‌اعتبار.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.name: مداخله بین‌المللی
scenarioProbabilities_fa.body: افزایش جزئی. آسیب اقتصادی جهانی = فشار بین‌المللی. اما سپاه مذاکره نمی‌کند.

theoryEvaluation.title: IRGC energy doctrine crossed from harassment to industrial damage
theoryEvaluation.body: D20 evening marks a QUALITATIVE SHIFT in the energy war. Kuwait's Mina al-Ahmadi (730K bbl/day) and Mina Abdullah refineries both ablaze. QatarEnergy confirms 'several' LNG facilities hit with 'sizeable fires' and 'extensive damage.' This is fundamentally different from intercepted drones and minor harassment: real industrial capacity is being destroyed. Combined capacity at risk: ~1.4M bbl/day Kuwait refining + ~25% of global LNG trade (Qatar). Brent surging to $114+ with Citi forecasting $120+ coming days, $130 Q2-Q3. The IRGC's naming of targets on D19 was not aspirational — they are executing their energy doctrine systematically. Saudi FM's retaliation warning ('trust completely shattered') = Gulf states approaching military entry threshold. This was THE scenario that drives escalation probability up to 45%.

theoryEvaluation.title: Nuclear paradox deepens as war legitimacy collapses
theoryEvaluation.body: Gabbard's testimony confirmed Iran was NOT rebuilding enrichment pre-war — Trump's justification collapsed. But IAEA reports: 440kg at 60% = ~10 weapons at Isfahan underground tunnel, 'regular vehicular activity' at entrance, inspectors haven't visited. E3: 'increasing risk of diversion.' Grossi: war cannot eliminate nuclear program. The war may be creating the nuclear risk it was supposed to prevent. Meanwhile, the energy war escalation = IRGC has zero incentive to cooperate on nuclear transparency. Isfahan underground remains Schrödinger's enrichment plant.

theoryEvaluation.title: Convergence of constraints vs IRGC escalation = unstable equilibrium
theoryEvaluation.body: US faces converging constraints: (1) MILITARY: missile depletion, $200B+ supplemental; (2) POLITICAL: Gabbard + Kent = legitimacy crisis; (3) DIPLOMATIC: no partner. But IRGC is ESCALATING, not accommodating — Kuwait refineries, Qatar LNG, named targets. This creates unstable equilibrium: US political will declining while IRGC provocations increasing. Something must give. Either: (a) IRGC provocation triggers Saudi entry → total war; (b) US Congress revolts on funding → forced drawdown → IRGC claims victory; (c) informal accommodation emerges despite escalation. Evening's Kuwait damage makes (a) significantly more likely.

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: سپاه: از آزار به تخریب صنعتی
theoryEvaluation_fa.body: کویت ۲ پالایشگاه آتش (~۱.۴ میلیون بشکه). قطر چند LNG (۲۵٪ جهان). نفت ۱۱۴+. سیتی: ۱۲۰+. تغییر کیفی. عربستان: 'اعتماد شکسته' = آستانه نظامی.

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: پارادوکس هسته‌ای عمیق‌تر
theoryEvaluation_fa.body: گابارد: بازسازی نشده. اما IAEA: ۱۰ سلاح + اصفهان ناشناخته. جنگ = خطری که قرار بود جلویش گرفته شود. سپاه تشدید = بدون انگیزه همکاری.

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: تعادل ناپایدار: محدودیت آمریکا vs تشدید سپاه
theoryEvaluation_fa.body: آمریکا: مشروعیت فروریخت. اما سپاه تشدید. یا ورود عربستان (جنگ تمام) یا کنگره بودجه رد (خروج) یا توافق غیررسمی.

endstate.title: Most likely (45%)
endstate.body: Escalation spiral — probability INCREASED by evening's industrial damage. IRGC crossed from harassment to capacity destruction: Kuwait 2 refineries ablaze, Qatar several LNG facilities, Brent $114+. Saudi FM 'trust shattered' + retaliation warning = military entry threshold approaching. If Saudi enters: total regional war. Gabbard legitimacy crisis = political brake on US but IRGC provocations overriding. The question is no longer IF IRGC hits industrial targets — they ARE. Now: does Saudi respond militarily?

endstate.title: Second (20%)
endstate.body: Protracted attrition — less likely after evening's escalation. For this scenario: IRGC must stop hitting real industrial targets and revert to interceptable harassment. Evening suggests opposite trajectory. If Gulf defenses improve rapidly and IRGC precision-strike capability depletes, could still revert. Oil $100-115 range. Politically toxic but militarily sustainable.

endstate.title: Emerging (12%)
endstate.body: International intervention. Kuwait refineries + Qatar LNG + Brent $114 = global economic urgency. Citi $130 forecast = recession trigger. IMO + E3 + 12 FM momentum increasing. Most likely form: UN-brokered Hormuz corridor. But no Iranian negotiating partner.

endstate.title: Wild card (5%)
endstate.body: IRGC hits Samref, Jubail, Mesaieed, Al Hosn simultaneously = oil $150+, total Gulf shutdown. Saudi declares war. OR: Congress revolts on $200B+ supplemental + Gabbard testimony = forced drawdown. OR: Isfahan underground operational = nuclear crisis. Evening's trajectory makes the first scenario increasingly plausible.

endstate_fa.title: محتمل‌ترین (۴۵٪)
endstate_fa.body: مارپیچ تشدید — افزایش. کویت ۲ پالایشگاه + قطر LNG = از آزار به تخریب. عربستان: 'شکسته.' اگر وارد: جنگ تمام. سؤال: عربستان پاسخ نظامی؟

endstate_fa.title: دوم (۲۰٪)
endstate_fa.body: فرسایشی — بعیدتر. سپاه تشدید نه آزار. نفت ۱۰۰-۱۱۵.

endstate_fa.title: نوظهور (۱۲٪)
endstate_fa.body: مداخله. پالایشگاه + LNG + نفت ۱۱۴ = فوریت جهانی. هرمز کریدور ممکن.

endstate_fa.title: غیرمنتظره (۵٪)
endstate_fa.body: سپاه تمام اهداف = ۱۵۰+. یا کنگره رد = خروج. یا اصفهان = هسته‌ای.

shippingRoutes.detail: Unchanged. Regional aviation collapsed. Iran named UAE targets including Al Hosn gas. IRGC evacuation orders. Habshan shutdown. Dubai airport intermittently operating. This route remains permanently dead for duration of conflict.
shippingRoutes.eta: N/A — route permanently disrupted for duration of conflict

shippingRoutes.detail: Closed. NATO intercepted missiles over Turkey. Iraq 250K bbl/day via Ceyhan = Turkey–Iraq oil corridor functional but Turkey–Iran border remains shut for commercial traffic. Swedish execution may complicate European transit arrangements.
shippingRoutes.eta: Not viable until conflict ends + diplomatic normalization

shippingRoutes.detail: Still most viable but DECLINING FURTHER. Bandar Anzali HEAVY BOMBARDMENT = Caspian/northern theater intensifying significantly. Warships destroyed, fuel storage damaged at major northern port. Strikes reaching Shahin Shahr (Isfahan area), Tehran overnight. IRGC dictatorship = civilian logistics subordinated. Energy war producing real industrial damage = war intensifying not winding down.
Eastern borders not directly in combat zone but infrastructure minimal. Caspian Sea strikes = northern/eastern expansion. No change in assessment.
shippingRoutes.eta: Months to establish if even possible

shippingRoutes_fa.detail: بدون تغییر. سپاه: الحصن هدف. حبشان تعطیل.
بسته. عراق نفت از ترکیه. اعدام سوئدی = پیچیدگی اروپا.
هنوز بهترین اما بدتر. بندرانزلی بمباران سنگین = شمال تشدید. ناوها نابود. شاهین‌شهر + تهران.

publishingStatus: Paper supply: CRITICAL. Hormuz closed + rial collapsed. IRGC dictatorship = civilian economy subordinated.
Internet blackout: 250+ hours (3+ weeks). Total communications isolation. IRGC controls all channels.

Power outages: WORSENING. Bandar Anzali fuel storage damaged. Shahin Shahr hit. Tehran overnight strikes. CENTCOM: 7,800+ targets. Energy infrastructure on BOTH sides being destroyed — Kuwait 2 refineries + Qatar LNG + Iran fuel/power.
Isfahan + Shiraz: Both under sustained bombardment. Shahin Shahr police station hit (near Isfahan). Caspian expansion = new strike regions daily.
56+ cultural sites damaged. 5,300+ dead. IRGC relocating to civilian spaces = increased collateral.
New title production: Effectively halted. No civilian economic planning. Energy war destroying infrastructure on all sides.
Assessment: Existential crisis deepening. IRGC energy doctrine producing real industrial damage globally — this war is INTENSIFYING not winding down. Recovery timeline: years minimum and extending.
publishingStatus_fa: کاغذ: بحرانی. سپاه = اقتصاد تابع جنگ.
برق: بدتر. بندرانزلی مخازن. شاهین‌شهر. تهران. ۷,۸۰۰+ هدف.
اصفهان + شیراز: بمباران. شاهین‌شهر. خزر = مناطق جدید.
تولید متوقف. جنگ انرژی هر دو طرف.
بحران وجودی عمیق‌تر. جنگ تشدید نه کاهش. سال‌ها.
impactIranfarhang: PRIMARY ROUTE DEAD: Tehran→Dubai→Atlanta completely non-functional. IRGC hitting UAE targets. Habshan shutdown. No improvement possible.

BEST ALTERNATIVE DECLINING: Armenia (Agarak/Norduz) — viability reduced to 15-20%. Bandar Anzali heavy bombardment = Caspian/northern theater intensifying. Warships destroyed, fuel storage damaged. IRGC dictatorship = civilian logistics subordinated.

SUPPLY SOURCE CRITICAL: CENTCOM 7,800+ targets, 25 provinces. Bandar Anzali + Shahin Shahr + Tehran overnight = strikes intensifying everywhere. 5,300+ dead. Internet 250+ hrs. No civilian economic recovery channel.
OFAC STATUS: Informational materials exemption (31 CFR §560.210(c)) remains valid. Swedish execution + IRGC dictatorship + energy war escalation = compliance tightening. Watch for new designations.
FINANCIAL: Rial collapsed. Brent $114+. Citi: $120+ coming days. Kuwait refineries ablaze + Qatar LNG = cascading supply crisis. IRGC controls economy.

WINDOW CLOSING RAPIDLY: IRGC energy doctrine crossed from threats to industrial damage. Kuwait 2 refineries + Qatar several LNG = real capacity destruction. Saudi FM warns retaliation = Gulf states approaching military entry. Brent trajectory toward $120-130. No off-ramp visible.
impactIranfarhang_fa: ارمنستان: ۱۵-۲۰٪. بندرانزلی بمباران = شمال بدتر. ناوها نابود.
منبع بحرانی: ۷,۸۰۰+ هدف. بندرانزلی + شاهین‌شهر + تهران. ۵,۳۰۰+ کشته. اینترنت ۲۵۰+.
OFAC: معتبر. اعدام سوئدی + سپاه = سخت‌تر.
مالی: ریال. نفت ۱۱۴+. سیتی: ۱۲۰+. کویت + قطر = بحران عرضه.
پنجره بسته: سپاه از تهدید به تخریب. ۲ پالایشگاه + LNG. عربستان هشدار. نفت ۱۲۰-۱۳۰.

Identify ANY Tehran warehouse partners still operational. Shahin Shahr + Tehran overnight strikes = access worsening.
Pre-negotiate Yerevan→Poti/Batumi→sea→US. Only viable option but declining.
Accelerate procurement of accessible pre-war inventory — window narrowing daily.
Brief clients: 12+ month supply interruption likely. War INTENSIFYING not winding down.
Monitor KEMCO — Swedish execution + IRGC dictatorship + Brent $114 = compliance tightening.
Prepare for TOTAL supply interruption 12+ months. Four crises accelerating = no resolution visible.
Isfahan nuclear: IAEA locked out, 10 weapons-worth. Any breakout = new sanctions regime.
URGENT: IRGC NOW EXECUTING named targets. Kuwait 2 refineries + Qatar LNG already hit. If Samref/Jubail/Al Hosn next: oil $130+, total logistics collapse.
Pezeshkian resignation + Saudi military entry = two triggers that could transform conflict overnight.
prepIranfarhang_fa: انبارهای تهران — شاهین‌شهر + تهران حمله = بدتر.

بحرانی: عربستان — 'اعتماد شکسته.' آستانه نظامی. اگر وارد: همه مرده.

impactKIP: Iran-UAE corridor: DEAD. IRGC hitting UAE targets. Habshan shutdown continues. Risk maximum.
UAE asset risk: EXTREME. Habshan still shut. IRGC named targets being executed elsewhere (Kuwait, Qatar). UAE next. E3 military backing continues.

Hormuz: Permission-based transit but IRGC industrial damage campaign contradicts any normalization. Kuwait refineries + Qatar LNG = IRGC escalating not accommodating. 21 tankers since war began vs 100+/day pre-war.

QATAR: QatarEnergy confirms 'SEVERAL' LNG facilities hit — 'sizeable fires,' 'extensive damage.' Goes beyond Ras Laffan. ~25% of global LNG trade under systematic attack. Attaches expelled. Force majeure ongoing.

KUWAIT: TWO refineries ablaze — Mina al-Ahmadi (730K bbl/day) + Mina Abdullah. First direct hits on Kuwait oil refining infrastructure. Combined ~1.4M bbl/day at risk. IRGC energy doctrine producing real industrial damage.
Banking: IRGC dictatorship + Swedish execution + $114 oil = compliance TIGHTENING. Citi: $120+. Isfahan nuclear = potential new designations. KEMCO under pressure.
Physical security: IRGC energy doctrine EXECUTED — no longer aspirational. Real infrastructure burning. Saudi FM warns retaliation. Operating environment DETERIORATING rapidly.

قطر: قطرانرژی — چند LNG حمله. ۲۵٪ جهان تهدید.

امنیت: سپاه اجرا. زیرساخت می‌سوزد. عربستان هشدار. بدتر.
